name: slime
description: slime is an LLM post-training framework from Tsinghua's THUDM team, powering GLM-4.5, GLM-4.6, and GLM-4.7. It connects Megatron-LM for training with SGLang for high-throughput rollout generation.
trigger: **Choose slime when you need:** - Megatron-LM native training with SGLang inference
